location_permission_message: Please grant permission so we can show your location.
profile_photo_upload_failed: Profile photo could not be uploaded.
logout_message: Are you sure you want to log out?
feedback_need_help_description: You can contact our team by filling out the form below. We will get back to you as soon as possible about your issue.
feedback_form_validation: Please fill in both restaurant name and message fields.
feedback_login_required: You must be logged in to submit feedback.
feedback_sent_message: Your feedback has been received. Thank you.
faq_what_is_vaveyla_answer: Vaveyla is an e-commerce app where you can discover bakery products and place orders quickly.
faq_how_to_join_volunteer_question: How do I place an order?
faq_how_to_join_volunteer_answer: Add products to your cart, then complete the address and payment steps to place your order.
faq_volunteer_tasks_answer: You can pay securely using credit cards, wallet balance, and other supported payment options.
faq_services_free_answer: Yes. All payment transactions are encrypted and processed through a secure payment infrastructure.
faq_contact_volunteer_question: How can I track my order?
faq_contact_volunteer_answer: You can view real-time order status from the My Orders section in your profile.
faq_fee_answer: Delivery fee is calculated automatically at checkout based on your address, distance, and active campaigns.
faq_more_volunteers_answer: You can cancel orders within a limited time before preparation starts. Eligible orders are refunded.
faq_cities_answer: Service coverage is expanding continuously. You can see current availability during address selection.
